channel.title: Za Ndani
channel.description: Kenya and World News, Politics, Sports, and Entertainment

item.title: Kenya to Launch Sustainability Bond Linked to Green Targets
item.dc:creator: Grace Mkamburi
item.description: Kenya is set to issue a sovereign sustainability-linked bond that adjusts debt interest rates based on forest conservation and rural electrification goals.
item.content:encoded: Kenya is set to issue a sovereign sustainability-linked bond that adjusts debt interest rates based on forest conservation and rural electrification goals.

item.title: Government Declares June 25 a Working Day Amid Protest Warnings
item.dc:creator: Celestine Nzioka
item.description: Isaac Mwaura has confirmed that June 25 remains a normal working day as the government warns against potential chaos during planned protest commemorations.
item.content:encoded: Isaac Mwaura has confirmed that June 25 remains a normal working day as the government warns against potential chaos during planned protest commemorations.

item.title: Murkomen Opposes School Closures During Planned Protests
item.dc:creator: Celestine Nzioka
item.description: Cabinet Secretary Kipchumba Murkomen has criticized calls to close schools during upcoming protests, asserting that education remains a priority.
item.content:encoded: Cabinet Secretary Kipchumba Murkomen has criticized calls to close schools during upcoming protests, asserting that education remains a priority.

item.title: Nairobi men are increasingly using steroids to build muscle instead of relying on natural training
item.dc:creator: Zed Mogaka
item.description: Nairobi men are increasingly turning to performance-enhancing drugs over natural training to build muscle, raising health concerns across city gyms.
item.content:encoded: Nairobi men are increasingly turning to performance-enhancing drugs over natural training to build muscle, raising health concerns across city gyms.

item.title: KDF troops complete combat training for new Somalia mission
item.dc:creator: Celestine Nzioka
item.description: Kenyan soldiers have finished specialized training in Isiolo ahead of their deployment to Somalia under the new African Union mission as borders remain shut.
item.content:encoded: Kenyan soldiers have finished specialized training in Isiolo ahead of their deployment to Somalia under the new African Union mission as borders remain shut.
